name: rag_retrieve_documents
description: Search the user's uploaded documents for context relevant to their question. Use this tool first whenever the user asks something that could be answered by their uploaded documents. Returns the most relevant text passages with source citations. If the result is empty, answer from general knowledge.

query.description: The user's question to search for in their uploaded documents.

tenantId.description: The user's unique tenant ID (their Cognito sub claim). Scopes the search to their documents only.

topK.description: Number of document chunks to retrieve (1-8, default 5).
